feedback: Mae hwn yn wasanaeth newydd, bydd eich adborth (yn agor mewn tab newydd) yn ein helpu i'w wella.
contactUsForHelp: Cysylltu â ni i gael cymorth
contactUsForHelpText: Os oes angen help arnoch i ddefnyddio'r gwasanaeth hwn, cysylltwch â ni.
contactUsDetailsEmailLinkText: gwasanaeth chwilio am lys neu dribiwnlys (agor mewn tab newydd)
contactUsDetailsEmailIntroSuffix: i ddod o hyd i gyfeiriad e-bost eich llys lleol.
contactUsDetailsEmailHelp: Os nad ydych yn gwybod enw eich llys lleol, dewiswch y categori Arian ac yna'r categori Tai i ddod o hyd iddo.
contactUsDetailsTelephoneHours: Dydd Llun i ddydd Iau 9am - 5pm, dydd Gwener 9am - 4.30pm.
contactUsDetailsCallChargesLinkText: Gwybodaeth am gost galwadau (agor mewn ffenestr newydd)

errors.title: Mae yna broblem
errors.defaultMaxLength: Rhaid iddo fod yn {uchafswm} nod neu lai
errors.defaultSpecialCharacter: cy{fieldName} must only include letters a to z, and special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes

date.notRealDate: cyDate must be a real date
date.futureDate: Rhaid i’r dyddiad fod yn y gorffennol
date.pastDate: Rhaid i'r dyddiad fod yn y dyfodol
date.yearMustBeSameOrAfter: Rhaid i'r flwyddyn fod yr un fath â neu ar ôl {{minYear}}

documentUpload.wrongFileTypeDocStore: cyThe selected file must be a DOC/DOT/DOCX/DOTX, XLS/XLT/XLA/XLSX/XLTX/XLSB, PPT/POT/PPS/PPA/PPTX/POTX/PPSX, PDF, TXT/RTF/CSV, JPG/JPEG, PNG, BMP, TIF/TIFF
documentUpload.fileTooLargeDocStore: cyFile you have uploaded is too big. Document files must be less than {{maxSize}}.
documentUpload.fileTooLargeMedia: cyFile you have uploaded is too big. Image files must be smaller than {{maxSize}}.
documentUpload.fileTotalTooLargeDocStore: cyThe selected files must be smaller than {{maxSize}}. Delete one or more files or reduce the file sizes.
documentUpload.filenameTooLong: cyThe file name must be {{maxLength}} characters or fewer
documentUpload.uploadFailed: cyThe selected file could not be uploaded – try again
documentUpload.fileDeleteFailed: cyThe file could not be removed – try again

timeout.title: Byddwch yn cael eich allgofnodi'n fuan
timeout.subtitle: Am resymau diogelwch, byddwch yn cael eich allgofnodi mewn
timeout.caption: Mae eich atebion blaenorol wedi cael eu cadw.

characterCount.textareaDescriptionText: cyYou can enter up to %{count} characters

pageNotFound.title: Ni ellir dod o hyd i’r dudalen
pageNotFound.paragraph: cyIf you typed the web address, check it is correct.
pageNotFound.paragraph2: cyIf you pasted the web address, check you copied the entire address.
pageNotFound.paragraph3: cyIf the web address is correct or you selected a link or button, contact us by email or telephone.
pageNotFound.heading: E-bost
pageNotFound.paragraph4: cyUse the find a court or tribunal service (opens in new tab) to get your local court’s email address.
pageNotFound.paragraph5: Os nad ydych yn gwybod enw eich llys lleol, dewiswch y categori Arian ac yna'r categori Tai i ddod o hyd iddo.
pageNotFound.paragraph7: Dydd Llun i ddydd Iau 9am - 5pm, dydd Gwener 9am - 4.30pm.
pageNotFound.paragraph8: cyFind out about call charges (opens in new tab).

serviceUnavailable.title: cySorry, the service is unavailable
serviceUnavailable.paragraphMinutes: cyYou will be able to use the service in {{minutes}} minutes.
serviceUnavailable.paragraphDateAndTime: cyYou will be able to use the service from {{time}} on {{date}}.
serviceUnavailable.paragraph2: cyFor help with your case, contact us by email or telephone.

serviceUnavailable.paragraph7: cyFind out about call charges (opens in new tab).

technicalError.title: cySorry, there is a problem with the service
technicalError.paragraph2: cyWe saved your answers. They will be available for 30 days.
